data.title: Jamie Dimon's Crypto Change Of Heart? Trump Once Claimed Shift, But JPMorgan CEO Still A Skeptic When It Comes To Bitcoin
data.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon is well-known in cryptocurrency circles for his fierce criticism of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), even going so far as to dub the leading coin a "fraud."

data.title: Palantir's $4 Million ARPC Estimate 'Flawed,' Says 'Pharma Bro' Martin Shkreli, But 'I Wouldn't Bet Against Them'
data.description: Martin Shkreli, the controversial former hedge fund manager known as "Pharma Bro," questioned but ultimately defended Palantir Technologies Inc.'s growth projections on Wednesday, calling analysis of the company's $4 million average revenue per customer "flawed."

data.title: Mark Cuban Hints That This One Mistake Has Killed Too Many Shark Tank Deals: 'Thought They Were Profitable And They Weren't'
data.description: Mark Cuban warned that many small business owners on Shark Tank mistakenly believe they're profitable, only to unravel during due diligence — a common oversight he says continues to kill deals and highlights a widespread failure to understand key financial metrics.

data.title: NRG Energy's $560 Million Acquisition Adds 738 MW of Flexible Gas-Fired Power: Details
data.description: NRG Energy, Inc. to acquire 738 MW of natural gas generation in Texas for $560 million. Deal expected to boost presence in growing energy market.

data.title: Sam Altman Warns AI Will Be Deflationary, But Says OpenAI's Biggest Constraint Isn't Data Or Demand, It's GPUs
data.description: Sam Altman says AI will have a deflationary impact on the global economy, but warns the company's biggest constraint isn't data or demand.
